title: Cuneiform Tablet #0544: Neo-Babylonian Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
